ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dogs" (
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dog */,
  "animal_name" TEXT /* Name of the dog */,
  "animal_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the dog (M or F) */,
  "animal_birth_month" TEXT /* Birth month of the dog */,
  "breed_name" TEXT /* Breed of the dog */,
  "breed_type" TEXT /* Type of breed (purebred, mixed, etc.) */,
  "animal_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the dog in pounds */,
  "animal_height" TEXT /* Height of the dog in inches */,
  "is_spayed_neutered" INTEGER /* Whether the dog is spayed or neutered */,
  "microchip_id" TEXT /* Microchip ID of the dog */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the owner */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the owner */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dog the license belongs to */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner the license belongs to */,
  "license_issued_date" TEXT /* Date the license was issued */,
  "license_expired_date" TEXT /* Date the license expires */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (annual, biennial, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_license_type FOREIGN KEY ("license_type") REFERENCES license_types ("license_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination */,
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dog the vaccination belongs to */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccination administered */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccination was administered */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccination expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_vaccination_type FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_type") REFERENCES vaccination_types ("vaccination_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_districts" (
  "community_district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community district */,
  "community_district_name" TEXT /* Name of the community district */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough the community district belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_districts_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_tracts" (
  "census_tract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census tract */,
  "census_tract_name" TEXT /* Name of the census tract */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough the census tract belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_tracts_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ntas" (
  "nta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NTA */,
  "nta_name" TEXT /* Name of the NTA */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough the NTA belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ntas_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_council_districts" (
  "city_council_district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city council district */,
  "city_council_district_name" TEXT /* Name of the city council district */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough the city council district belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_council_district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_council_districts_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "congressional_districts" (
  "congressional_district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each congressional district */,
  "congressional_district_name" TEXT /* Name of the congressional district */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough the congressional district belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("congressional_district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_congressional_districts_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_senatorial_districts" (
  "state_senatorial_district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state senatorial district */,
  "state_senatorial_district_name" TEXT /* Name of the state senatorial district */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough the state senatorial district belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_senatorial_district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_senatorial_districts_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dog_licenses_by_borough" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough */,
  "total_licenses" INTEGER /* Total number of dog licenses issued in the borough */,
  "license_renewal_rate" TEXT /* License renewal rate for the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dog_licenses_by_community_district" (
  "community_district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community district */,
  "total_licenses" INTEGER /* Total number of dog licenses issued in the community district */,
  "license_renewal_rate" TEXT /* License renewal rate for the community district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dog_licenses_by_zip_code" (
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code */,
  "total_licenses" INTEGER /* Total number of dog licenses issued in the zip code */,
  "license_renewal_rate" TEXT /* License renewal rate for the zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dog_vaccinations_by_borough" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of dog vaccinations administered in the borough */,
  "vaccination_rate" TEXT /* Vaccination rate for the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dog_vaccinations_by_community_district" (
  "community_district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community district */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of dog vaccinations administered in the community district */,
  "vaccination_rate" TEXT /* Vaccination rate for the community district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dog_vaccinations_by_zip_code" (
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of dog vaccinations administered in the zip code */,
  "vaccination_rate" TEXT /* Vaccination rate for the zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_types" (
  "vaccination_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination type */,
  "vaccination_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_types" (
  "license_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license type */,
  "license_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the license type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_type_id")
)
